source: CFPB Consumer Response Annual Report 2025, Table 1, Page 15

response_categories.closed_with_monetary_relief: Company provided objective, measurable, verifiable monetary relief
response_categories.closed_with_non_monetary_relief: Company provided other objective, verifiable relief (stopped calls, corrected info, restored access)
response_categories.closed_with_explanation: No relief but provided written explanation
response_categories.administrative_response: Company returned complaint (fraud, litigation, unauthorized third party, duplicate, wrong company)

key_insights: 40% of credit reporting complaints result in non-monetary relief (corrections)
94% of money transfer complaints closed with explanation only (denials)
Credit cards have highest monetary relief rate at 12%
Student loans have 31% untimely response rate due to SAVE litigation
